title: nymphaea alba subsp. minoriflora
intro: Nymphaea alba subsp. minoriflora, also known as the small-flowered white lotus, is a subspecies of the Nymphaea alba plant, which is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the water lily family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce swelling, fight infections, and promote healing. The health benefits of Nymphaea alba subsp. minoriflora include its potential to reduce stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression, making it a popular herbal remedy for mental health. Herbal preparations of Nymphaea alba subsp. minoriflora include tea, tinctures, and extracts, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
